title: Fill a Form
description: Navigate to a form, inspect fields via snapshot, fill values, and submit.

steps.annotation: Navigate to a demo form page on httpbin.org
See the form fields and their @ref IDs

steps.content:
[page snapshot]
  HTML form — httpbin.org
  ───────────────────────
  Customer name:  [@ref=1] <input name="custname" type="text">
  Telephone:      [@ref=2] <input name="custtel" type="tel">
  E-mail:         [@ref=3] <input name="custemail" type="email">
  Pizza Size:
    [@ref=4] <input type="radio" name="size" value="small"> Small
    [@ref=5] <input type="radio" name="size" value="medium"> Medium
    [@ref=6] <input type="radio" name="size" value="large"> Large
  Toppings:
    [@ref=7] <input type="checkbox" name="topping" value="bacon"> Bacon
    [@ref=8] <input type="checkbox" name="topping" value="cheese"> Extra Cheese
  Delivery time:  [@ref=9] <input name="delivery" type="time">
  [@ref=10] <textarea name="comments"> Special instructions
  [@ref=11] <button type="submit"> Submit order
Every form element has a @ref ID. Use browse_fill with the @ref to set values — no CSS selectors needed.

steps.annotation: Click the submit button to send the form

steps.content: Form submitted and the server echoed back our data. No XPath, no CSS selectors — just @ref IDs.
